metadata.description:
Master execution plan for all 5 PRs needed before the full GCP factorial experiment runs. Execution order is dependency-driven: PR-C first (creates training infrastructure), then PR-A (biostatistics gaps), PR-B (evaluation pipeline), PR-D (deployment), PR-E (cost reporting).
After all 5 PRs merge: 2-epoch GCP debug run (24 conditions × fold-0), then full 72-run production experiment.
metadata.factorial_design: 4 models × 3 losses × 2 aux_calib × 2 post-training × 2 recalibration × 5 ensemble = 480 conditions

metadata.total-issues: 5 PRs, ~36 TDD tasks (incl. OpenLineage wiring per Issue #799)

branch.name: feat/post-training-factorial
branch.summary: mL1-ACE auxiliary calibration loss + SWA/Multi-SWA factorial config. Creates the c=2 and k=3 training factors. Must complete first because the 2-epoch debug run depends on the aux_calib flag.

tasks.task: T1: Implement hL1-ACE loss function (from cai4cai repo, CC BY 4.0)
T2: Integrate hL1-ACE into compound loss factory (with_aux_calib flag)
T5: Hydra config for aux_calib factor

branch.risk: MEDIUM (mL1-ACE gradient flow through hard binning needs verification)
branch.guardrails: - CC BY 4.0 attribution in module docstring - with_aux_calib=false must be backward-compatible - No import re for parsing - All tests pass make test-staging

branch.name: feat/biostatistics-factorial-gaps
branch.summary: Fill 5 biostatistics gaps: two-way ANOVA (eta-squared/omega-squared), calibration metrics (Brier/O:E/IPA/slope), Riley instability, interaction plots, cost appendix table, TRIPOD verification.

tasks.task: T1: Two-way ANOVA with effect sizes (pingouin + statsmodels)
T2: Interaction plots (Model × Loss for clDice/MASD)
T4: Calibration metrics: Brier, O:E, IPA, slope
T6: Cost appendix LaTeX table generation
T8: Integration test with synthetic factorial data

branch.risk: LOW (all statistical methods well-understood, libraries available)
branch.guardrails: - Use pingouin for ANOVA (already installed) - Use sklearn for calibration metrics - No regex for condition key parsing - JSON sidecars for all figures

branch.name: feat/evals-factorial-ensembles
branch.summary: CV-average MLflow pyfunc, factorial ensemble strategies (5 levels), hierarchical ensemble pyfunc, factorial evaluation orchestrator, UQ metric logging, specification curve figure, rank discrepancy table.

tasks.task: T6: UQ metric logging per volume

branch.risk: MEDIUM (hierarchical ensemble MLflow pyfunc is novel architecture)
branch.guardrails: - CV-average is NOT an ensemble (distinct class) - Ensemble operates ON TOP of fold strategy - Model-agnostic via ModelAdapter ABC - UQ uses Lakshminarayanan et al. decomposition - Specification curve follows Simmons et al. format

branch.name: feat/deploy-flow-factorial
branch.summary: Champion model selection from factorial results, BentoML import chain verification, serving health check, champion metadata logging.

tasks.task: T1: Champion model selection from factorial results
T4: Champion metadata logging for manuscript

branch.risk: LOW (deploy flow already implemented, this extends it)
branch.guardrails: - ONNX opset 17 - BENTOML_HOME on mounted volume - Champion metadata includes TRIPOD fields

branch.name: feat/cost-reporting
branch.summary: Cost transparency for TRIPOD-LLM Item 12: instance type logging, spot vs on-demand savings computation, cost appendix integration into biostatistics flow.

tasks.task: T1: Instance type and cost param logging
T2: Spot vs on-demand savings computation
T3: Cost appendix integration into biostatistics flow

branch.risk: LOW (extends existing cost/ metric prefix infrastructure)
branch.guardrails: - No hardcoded cloud rates - Read from SkyPilot env or config - Slash-prefix convention (cost/) - Works with zero-cost local runs

step.name: 2-Epoch GCP Debug Run
step.description: 24 conditions (4 models × 3 losses × 2 aux_calib) × fold-0 × 2 epochs. One-by-one with MLflow verification between each run. Estimated cost: ~$6-8 on GCP L4 spot.
step.go_no_go: All 24 runs produce finite metrics (clDice > 0.01, MASD < 100)

step.name: Post-Training Debug
step.description: Apply SWA and Multi-SWA to all 24 debug checkpoints (k=3 → 72 variants). Verify checkpoint sizes and MLflow tagging.

step.name: Evaluation Debug
step.description: Run factorial evaluation on debug checkpoints (72 × 2 fold strategies × 2 recalibration × 5 ensemble = subset). Verify metric logging and UQ.

step.name: Biostatistics Debug
step.description: Run biostatistics flow on debug results. Verify ANOVA, figures, tables. This is the end-to-end validation before committing to full runs.

step.name: Full Production Runs (~$98)
step.description: 72 training runs (24 conditions × 3 folds) × 50 epochs on GCP L4 spot. Sequential by model family for weight caching. SkyPilot spot recovery enabled.

step.name: Full Pipeline Execution
step.description: Post-training → Evaluation → Biostatistics → Deploy → Cost Report. Each flow verifies before proceeding to the next.
